title: [ExportVerilog] `appendPossiblyAbsolutePath` not found in unified build
body:
In doing a unified build, I'm getting:

```
ld.lld: error: undefined symbol: circt::appendPossiblyAbsolutePath(llvm::SmallVectorImpl<char>&, llvm::Twine const&)
>>> referenced by ExportVerilog.cpp:3597 (/home/jodemme/circt/lib/Conversion/ExportVerilog/ExportVerilog.cpp:3597)
>>>               ExportVerilog.cpp.o:((anonymous namespace)::SharedEmitterState::gatherFiles(bool)) in archive lib/libCIRCTExportVerilog.a
>>> referenced by ExportVerilog.cpp:3867 (/home/jodemme/circt/lib/Conversion/ExportVerilog/ExportVerilog.cpp:3867)
>>>               ExportVerilog.cpp.o:(createSplitOutputFile(mlir::Identifier, (anonymous namespace)::FileInfo&, llvm::StringRef, (anonymous namespace)::SharedEmitterState&)) in archive lib/libCIRCTExportVerilog.a
>>> referenced by BlackBoxReader.cpp:230 (/home/jodemme/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/BlackBoxReader.cpp:230)
>>>               BlackBoxReader.cpp.o:((anonymous namespace)::BlackBoxReaderPass::runOnAnnotation(mlir::Operation*, circt::firrtl::Annotation, mlir::OpBuilder&)) in archive lib/libCIRCTFIRRTLTransforms.a
>>> referenced 1 more times
clang: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
```

Introduced by d8d7153320640d703a503736b144069810c419b4. Likely missing a cmake dep.
